|desc={{p|Natu}} is Falkner's first known Pokémon. It is [[Walking Pokémon|usually seen on Falkner's shoulder]] when it is not battling. During his battle with {{PPM|Red}} at Sprout Tower, Falkner sends it out to have a battle with his {{TP|Red|Clefairy}}.

Natu's known moves are {{m|Leer}}, {{m|Teleport}}, {{m|Confuse Ray}}, and {{m|Peck}}.}}
